mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_address (id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_address WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE t_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
